executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 3024 threat advisories. Of these, 1648 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 637 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-INGEST, CDB-CVE-GEN, CDB-APT-22. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
